tasks.subject: PR2 Task 1: snapshot.json envelope, atomic IO, path resolver
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `state_coordinator::snapshot_file` - versioned envelope around `Snapshot`, atomic read/write mirroring `claude_statusline::file_io`, and `snapshot_file_path()`.

**Files:** crates/state_coordinator/src/snapshot_file.rs (create), src/lib.rs (re-export), Cargo.toml (add directories; tempfile/codex_local dev-deps as needed)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- envelope (de)serializes; ::new stamps SNAPSHOT_SCHEMA_VERSION
- write->read round-trips (assert schema_version + a cell; no PartialEq on Snapshot)
- missing->FileMissing, wrong version->SchemaDrift, malformed->ParseError, no .tmp left
- snapshot_file_path honors BALANZE_DATA_DIR_OVERRIDE else ProjectDirs data_dir()/snapshot.json

**Verify:** cargo nextest run -p state_coordinator

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/state_coordinator/src/snapshot_file.rs", "crates/state_coordinator/src/lib.rs", "crates/state_coordinator/Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo nextest run -p state_coordinator", "acceptanceCriteria": ["envelope (de)serializes; ::new stamps version", "write->read round-trips", "missing/drift/malformed map correctly; no tmp left", "path resolver honors override else ProjectDirs"]}
```

tasks.subject: PR2 Task 2: SnapshotFileSink writer decorator
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A `Sink` that persists the full `Snapshot` to snapshot.json on each update then delegates; best-effort (write failure logs warn!, never breaks inner/coordinator).

**Files:** crates/state_coordinator/src/sink_file.rs (create), src/lib.rs (re-export)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- SnapshotFileSink::new(inner, path) wraps any S: Sink
- on_snapshot writes snapshot.json AND calls inner.on_snapshot
- on_degraded delegates
- write failure does not panic; inner still called

**Verify:** cargo nextest run -p state_coordinator

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/state_coordinator/src/sink_file.rs", "crates/state_coordinator/src/lib.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo nextest run -p state_coordinator", "acceptanceCriteria": ["wraps any Sink", "on_snapshot writes file + delegates", "on_degraded delegates", "write failure does not panic, inner still called"]}
```

tasks.subject: PR2 Task 3: wire the writer into both hosts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wrap the coordinator sink with SnapshotFileSink in the Tauri host and CLI watch paths.

**Files:** src-tauri/src/lib.rs (boot_backend ~L334), crates/balanze_cli/src/watch_cmd.rs (~L60 streaming, ~L150 TUI)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Tauri host wraps TauriSink with SnapshotFileSink when path resolves; else bare + warn!
- CLI watch streaming + TUI wrapped
- cargo build --workspace succeeds; existing tests green

**Verify:** cargo build --workspace && cargo nextest run -p balanze_cli (tray smoke deferred to #136; CLI watch is the verifiable path)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src-tauri/src/lib.rs", "crates/balanze_cli/src/watch_cmd.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo build --workspace && cargo nextest run -p balanze_cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Tauri host wraps (fallback+warn)", "CLI watch both paths wrapped", "workspace builds; tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: PR2 Task 4: reader + Snapshot->CrossProvider mapper in cmd_statusline
tasks.description:
**Goal:** balanze-cli statusline reads snapshot.json, maps Codex/OpenAI cells into CrossProvider (TTL stale), passes to renderer; absent/unreadable -> Claude-only.

**Files:** crates/balanze_cli/src/statusline.rs (reader+mapper+thread cross; tests), Cargo.toml (codex_local/openai_client dev-deps if needed)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- cross_from_payload maps codex used_percent (f64->f32) + openai total_micro_usd; stale = age>120s
- fresh->Some(stale=false); old->stale=true; empty->cells None
- statusline_cross_provider() None on absent/parse-error/drift
- render_line threads cross; existing tests green; cross-render test passes

**Verify:** cargo nextest run -p balanze_cli; manual: watch (override data dir) writes snapshot.json then statusline reads it

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/balanze_cli/src/statusline.rs", "crates/balanze_cli/Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo nextest run -p balanze_cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["mapper maps cells + TTL stale", "fresh/old/empty handled", "absent/unreadable -> None", "render_line threads cross; cross-render test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: PR2 Task 5: document the snapshot.json IPC artifact
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document snapshot.json in ARCHITECTURE.md + add the missing statusline_render crate to the crate map.

**Files:** docs/ARCHITECTURE.md (crate map + IPC contract / boundary #12)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- crate map lists statusline_render
- snapshot.json documented: writer=host via SnapshotFileSink, reader=statusline, opposite direction to statusline.snapshot.json, 120s freshness, zero-network read
- no em-dash / ellipsis introduced

**Verify:** prose review; grep for em-dash/ellipsis

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/ARCHITECTURE.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -rc snapshot.json docs/ARCHITECTURE.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["crate map lists statusline_render", "snapshot.json documented fully", "no em-dash/ellipsis introduced"]}
```
